title: Stablecoins - The Empire Strikes Back
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by minting stablecoins on a lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints stablecoins immediately after a flash loan

red_flags: Unusual minting activity shortly after a flash loan
summary: Attackers used a flash loan to mint stablecoins, exploiting the protocol's logic. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
